title: daluq SMP Pack
description: This pack improves your experience in PvP battles or when you are exploring the world.
body:
daluq SMP Pack is a custom Minecraft texture pack designed to enhance your gameplay experience with improved visuals and functionality. Whether you're engaging in PvP battles or exploring the world, this pack offers a range of features to elevate your game.

🔧 Key Features
Transparent GUI:Provides a sleek, see-through user interface for a minimalist look.

Smooth End Crystal: Enhances the End Crystal's appearance with a smoother design.

Small Fire Effect: Adds a subtle fire effect to the End Crystal for added realism.

Custom Bow and Crossbow Loading Indicators: Features custom loading indicators for Bow and Crossbow, indicating charge levels.

Ore Outlines: Implements outlines around ores to improve visibility.

Pumpkin Blur Removal: Eliminates the pumpkin blur effect when wearing a carved pumpkin.

Small Totem Pop with Handheld Totem: Introduces a smaller totem pop animation.

Small Shield with Small Blocking Animation: Introduces a smaller shield model with adjusted blocking animation.

Removed Explosion Particles: Eliminates explosion particles to enhance PvP visibility.

Visible Powder Snow: Adds outlines to powder snow blocks for better visibility.

Custom XP Bottle Texture: Updates the XP Bottle texture to resemble a splash potion.

Tripwire Indicator: Introduces a visual indicator for tripwires.

Custom Sky: Works only with the mod: [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)

Animated Items: Makes items look nicer when holding in your hand 

And more ...

🎯 Purpose
The primary goal of daluq SMP pack is to offer a streamlined and immersive gameplay experience. By simplifying textures and enhancing visual clarity, the pack ensures that players can focus on the action without unnecessary distractions. This approach not only improves gameplay but also contributes to a more enjoyable and engaging environment for the modern PvP community.
